purpose: Map launch claims to capability status for DFW Matchday Concierge.

claims.claim: Call, text, and email contact paths are available.
DFW Matchday Concierge provides operator-assisted matchday planning and coordination.
AI-assisted intake is available as a preview concept.
claims.boundary: No live AI automation is approved.

claims.claim: Black Executive Vehicle Class may be reviewed for eligible VIP and executive bookings.
claims.boundary: No specific vehicle make or model is guaranteed before confirmation.

claims.claim: Driver onboarding is available as an interest and review lane.
claims.boundary: No automatic approval, assignment, earnings, or event access claim is allowed.

claims.claim: Concierge onboarding is available as an interest and review lane.
claims.boundary: No automatic approval, assignment, authority, or event access claim is allowed.

claims.claim: Fulfillment is available after confirmed scope and operator-approved routing.
claims.boundary: No instant dispatch or guaranteed fulfillment claim is allowed.

claims.claim: Payment or deposit may be required after quote and review.
claims.boundary: No live payment collection is approved until separately authorized.

claims.claim: Official tournament, team, venue, federation, sponsor, or credential affiliation exists.
Live dispatch, live routing, automatic assignment, or guaranteed fulfillment exists.
